title: NG34 0DT, Hinch Enterprises Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/EP3820LN/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Hinch Enterprises Limited   Installation name: Newton Grange Farm   Permit number: EPR/EP3820LN/A001   "
